{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320114451271EE8628FF9F960385E"}"},"total":282},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7282606982158418745","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以看，国家和主角的双向奔赴，主角的性格很好，就是在某些程度上重复度太高，会导致后面感觉在灌水[送心]需要注意下重复性太高的问题，是个好题材，加油不要烂尾","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":10,"text":"双向奔赴","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E5%A5%94%E8%B5%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773978291F960385E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227282606982158418745%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227193973724415003709%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E5%A5%94%E8%B5%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695615256,"group_id":"7193973724415003709","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不必纠结当下，也不必太担忧未来","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz8k3ktnJHhzBrnINnojaJU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/27ae65ccafd0489fa6e9f1e9442734f5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529035&x-signature=ondITeRfDouKQMiF96YpsEeCdjA%3D","user_id":"351499046631415","user_name":"栎晴晴"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"351499046631415","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7193973724415003709","book_info":{"abstract":"【国运+直播+小游戏+历史复苏+无女主+多图】
倾国之力沟通平行世界
穿越少年重现历史长河
有我，谁说华夏无历史！
------------------
蓝星异变，资源枯竭，只有通过国运游戏场的各种小游戏，来数万倍获取资源。
华夏作为唯一一个流传几千年从未断掉传承的古文明，本来应该一跃成为顶级国度，屹立世界之巅。然而一百多个国家联手，直接从概念上封禁了华夏历史，包括华夏人对历史的记忆、各种国内外历史记录、文物古迹、甚至网络上聊天记录里面的只言片语，失去了历史的华夏无法翻身。
国家将情况公开告知全国人民后，得到了九成以上国民的同意，举国之力从平行世界拉了一个少年的灵魂，将他送上了国运游戏场的舞台……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o50facc4c8612466ac0b393fed43c107c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"弓手阿布","author_id":"","book_id":"7193973724415003709","book_name":"国运：这个游戏我玩过","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#788080","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7194462796711461410","read_count":"10222","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1202804"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"586","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越,直播,无女主,国运","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5785ac35a23ec08c1d0ff319719e0bec~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779162291&x-signature=eEp8z81BKOLorU%2FL9sHW%2BaL6veg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"93110164668","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.7969807e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320114451271EE8628FF9F960385E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_
